sentence: 他在研究自己家族的世系。
pinyin: Tā zài yánjiū zìjǐ jiāzú de shì xì.

sentence: 埃及是世界上最著名的古文明之一。
pinyin: Āijí shì shìjiè shang zuì zhùmíng de gǔwénmíng zhī yī.
english: Egypt is one of the most famous ancient civilizations in the world.

pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī hěn yǒu qián zhān xìng.
english: This company has a very forward-looking vision.

sentence: 医生建议他定期检查是否有肝炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì tā dìngqī jiǎnchá shìfǒu yǒu gān yán.
english: The doctor advised him to get regular checkups for hepatitis.

sentence: 这场比赛的赔率对主队非常有利。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng bǐsài de péi lǜ duì zhǔduì fēicháng yǒulì.
english: The betting odds for this match strongly favor the home team.
